_meta.name: dt-radar-discovery
_meta.purpose: Monitor lag, throughput, dedup, and backpressure of the gharchive discovery pipeline during ISI-956 Stage C soak.
next_steps: Once ISI-951 lands and metrics flow, validate every DQL query individually (timeseries field resolves, has datapoints, expected aggregation).
Replace any tile whose DQL returns empty after Story 1 lands — likely indicates instrument-name drift; reconcile against schemas/github-radar.yaml.
Set dashboardId after first successful deploy via dtctl; update tile share-links in ISI-955.
_meta.metric_namespace_note: Dynatrace generic-metric ingest exposes OTLP names verbatim. timeseries selectors below use the dotted names from schemas/github-radar.yaml. If the team turns on Dynatrace metric-key normalization (dot → underscore), each `timeseries <name>` clause needs a one-pass rewrite.

0.title: GitHub Radar — Discovery Pipeline (gharchive)
0.content:
# GitHub Radar — Discovery Pipeline

Monitors the gharchive event-stream discovery source introduced in [ISI-950](https://example.invalid/ISI-950).

**Current health gates** (from [ISI-950](https://example.invalid/ISI-950) acceptance):

- Active repo count ≥ 5000 after 7-day soak
- Classifier queue depth bounded
- Live GitHub API rate-limit usage < 80%
- Dedup working (ratio > 0.9 steady state)

**Owner:** Observability Agent · **Story:** [ISI-955](https://example.invalid/ISI-955) · **Soak:** [ISI-956](https://example.invalid/ISI-956)

1.title: Archive ingest lag (seconds)
1.subtitle: Age of most-recently-processed gharchive archive. Steady-state: 5–80 min.

2.title: Candidates discovered per hour
2.subtitle: Repos surfaced by gharchive top-N + activity floor. Counter aggregated as hourly delta.

queries.query: timeseries candidates = sum(github_radar.discovery.gharchive.candidates_total), interval: 1h, by: { event_type } | fieldsAdd candidates = candidates[]

3.title: Dedup ratio (gharchive vs tracked set)
3.subtitle: Fraction of candidates dropped because already tracked. Steady-state target: > 0.9.

4.title: Classifier queue depth
4.subtitle: Pending candidates waiting on classifier. Co-owned with ISI-954 backpressure.

5.title: Daily candidate count vs cap
5.subtitle: Daily total of admitted candidates against Story 4 daily cap (default 5000/day).

querySpec._TODO_LINK: Wire `cap` constant from Story 4 config emission once ISI-954 publishes a `discovery.gharchive.daily_cap` info-metric. Until then the cap line is hard-coded.

6.title: Events processed by type
6.subtitle: Raw gharchive events processed after event_type filter. Spot drift in event-type mix.
